steps.title: Identify the passage structure
steps.content: The passage opens with an established hypothesis (woolly mammoths hunted to extinction by Clovis-point spears), then describes an experiment testing that hypothesis, and concludes with results that contradict it.

steps.title: Match the structure to the choices
steps.content:
Choice D directly captures this structure: it describes an experiment that tests an established hypothesis, with results that cast doubt on it. The other choices either misidentify the text's scope, focus on the wrong element of the passage, or require details not present.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
